name: Lemon Soup W/Garbanzo Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 can garbanzo beans, rinsed and drained (15-16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine broth, beans, garlic, turmeric and cumin in a large saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Whisk eggs and lemon juice until well-blended.
5. Gradually whisk 2 cups of soup into the egg mixture.
6. Return to saucepan.
7. Stir over medium-low heat until heated through, about 5 minutes (do not boil).
8. Add cayenne. Season with salt.
9. Ladle into bowls and sprinkle with mint.
